tools.Name: CloakBrowser
tools.Description: A stealth Chromium binary that mimics human behavior to pass advanced anti-bot detections.
tools.Use_Case: Automated data collection and browser automation for sites with strict bot protection.

tools.Name: Local Deep Research
tools.Description: An agentic research tool that runs locally, offering private, encrypted deep research capabilities.
tools.Use_Case: Performing automated deep-dive research with multiple LLMs and search engines while keeping data private.

tools.Name: PaddleOCR
tools.Description: A highly accurate, lightweight OCR toolkit designed to turn images and PDFs into structured data for LLMs.
tools.Use_Case: Converting complex documents (PDFs, images) into LLM-ready formats like Markdown or JSON.
